message:
Add comprehensive notification tests - daemon coverage 77% → 82%

- Add tests for DefaultWebhookNotifier: constructor, Send with success/error/empty URL
- Add tests for WithWebhook setter method
- Add tests for SendWebhook with various scenarios (nil, success, error, long cmd, redacted)
- Add tests for shortID helper function
- Add tests for Check with webhook integration
- Add tests for Run with nil, cancellation, and default interval
- Add edge case tests for Check (nil manager, empty path, nonexistent DB)

Daemon package coverage: 77.3% → 81.6%
Total project coverage: 89.1% → 89.7%
